violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of pizzas were found stored on the floor of the walk-in freezer. Food items should be stored off of the floor.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Package of napkins under the beverage dispenser found wet. Single use items should be protected from contamination.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee did not wash his hands before putting on gloves. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.
